nodes.context: Street gang based in Brixton, London, involved in drug trafficking, robberies, and violence.
Prominent gang in the area during the 1980s.
Gang formed by local youths as a successor to the 28s, but with no actual affiliation.
Local gang in Peckham, rival of PDC.
Splinter faction of PDC that converted to Islam and continued criminal activity.
Splinter gang formed by former members of PDC Brats, later joined Tiny OC to form GAS Gang.
Gang that merged with Y28s to form GAS Gang.
Gang formed by merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.
Splinter gang formed by former PDC members after Solomon Martin's death.
Splinter gang formed by former PDC members.
Gang formed by Tanna, who originally named PDC.
Ally of PDC listed in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The PDC continued Brixtons longtime rivalry with neighbouring Peckham by committing robberies in the area, causing conflict with local gang Peckham Boys.
edges.context: PDC had a rivalry with Peckham Boys, leading to conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: A faction of the PDC meanwhile broke off and converted to Islam in search of an identity while still continuing to engage in crime. This group, known as the 'Muslim Boys'
edges.context: Muslim Boys are a splinter faction of PDC.

edges.evidence_quote: Various independent gangs emerged from this splintering, such as the Muslim Boys ... and Y28s ... the latter of which was formed by former members of the PDC Brats
edges.context: Y28s formed from former members of PDC Brats, a subset of PDC.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of PDC that were affiliated with Blacker would dissociate from PDC and form their own gang known as CFR
edges.context: CFR formed by former PDC members after Solomon Martin's death.

edges.evidence_quote: Other former members of PDC would form PIF (Paid In Full)
edges.context: PIF formed by former PDC members.

edges.evidence_quote: Tanna, who came up with the name 'PDC', went and formed the 031 Bloods.
edges.context: 031 Bloods formed by Tanna, a former PDC member.

edges.evidence_quote: The Y28s would later join up with Tiny OC to form GAS Gang.
edges.context: Y28s and Tiny OC merged to form GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PIF (Paid In Full), CFR (Corleone Family Riderz), OC (Organised Crime) Nasty Squad, 031 (0-Tray 1 Bloods)
edges.context: OC Nasty Squad listed as an ally of PDC in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PIF (Paid In Full), CFR (Corleone Family Riderz), OC (Organised Crime) Nasty Squad, 031 (0-Tray 1 Bloods)
edges.context: PIF listed as an ally of PDC in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PIF (Paid In Full), CFR (Corleone Family Riderz), OC (Organised Crime) Nasty Squad, 031 (0-Tray 1 Bloods)
edges.context: CFR listed as an ally of PDC in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PIF (Paid In Full), CFR (Corleone Family Riderz), OC (Organised Crime) Nasty Squad, 031 (0-Tray 1 Bloods)
edges.context: 031 Bloods listed as an ally of PDC in infobox.
